meta_title: For Freelancers: Claude Code skills setup to Solve can't scale projects (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome can't scale projects. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Claude Code Skills Setup for Freelancers: Scale Your Workflow
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with project bottlenecks. Use this intermediate checklist to integrate Claude Code and Antigravity to automate your freelance dev workflow.
content.answer_block: To scale your freelance projects, you must move beyond manual coding. By integrating Claude Code with Antigravity, you transform your terminal into an autonomous engineering station. This setup automates repetitive boilerplate, orchestrates complex refactoring, and ensures consistent architecture across every client codebase, allowing you to ship features 10x faster.
content.intro:
The late-night grind of manual refactoring is the graveyard of freelance ambition. When your project count grows, your capacity for high-quality output hits a ceiling, leaving you trapped in a cycle of maintenance debt and missed deadlines. You aren't just building apps; you are fighting entropy.

The relief lies in shifting from manual execution to AI-orchestrated development. By mastering Claude Code and Antigravity, you move from being a solo coder to an engineering lead managing an autonomous workforce. This is how you reclaim your time and scale your output without sacrificing your sanity.

steps.title: Environment Readiness & Context Mapping
steps.description: Before automating, define your project's architectural boundaries to prevent hallucinated code patterns.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the existing directory structure and generate a comprehensive architecture map. Identify core dependencies and coding style guidelines to be used as a system prompt for all future AI tasks.

steps.title: Autonomous Boilerplate Injection
steps.description: Standardize your stack by creating a library of reusable, AI-optimized code components.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a standardized module scaffold for a REST API endpoint including error handling, logging, and unit tests based on my established project pattern.

steps.title: Automated Refactoring Cycles
steps.description: Eliminate technical debt systematically by instructing Claude to address specific code smells identified by your linter.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the output of the current linter report. Refactor the identified components to satisfy clean code principles while maintaining existing functionality.

steps.title: Intelligent Test Suite Synthesis
steps.description: Ensure reliability at scale by having the AI generate tests based on your implementation logic.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the business logic in the newly created module. Write a comprehensive Jest test suite covering happy paths and edge cases.

steps.title: Cross-Project Sync & Audit
steps.description: Maintain consistency across multiple client projects by auditing code against your global 'Best Practices' library.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Compare current file patterns against the global standard library. Flag any deviations and propose automated fixes.

pro_tips: Always define a .clauderules file in your root to force the AI to adhere to your specific design patterns before it starts coding.
Use Antigravity to generate 'AI-readable' documentation; this drastically improves Claude's performance on large, complex codebases.
Never accept code output blindly; leverage Claude Code's `--review` flag to force an internal verification pass before committing.
Create a 'Task Queue' file that the AI can read to pull in your daily freelance to-do list, creating a self-managing development loop.
Use session tags when running Claude Code to keep different client contexts isolated and prevent context leakage between projects.
content.next_steps: Begin by setting up your .clauderules file to establish your baseline standards, then automate your first module generation to see immediate time-savings.
content.conversion_block: Stop scaling your hours and start scaling your systems. The future of freelance development is autonomous, and you have the blueprint to lead the charge. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
